articles.author: Joey Barnes
articles.title: Indy 500 Fast 12 set as Josef Newgarden struggles in qualifying surprise - Motorsport.com
articles.description: Felix Rosenqvist led the advancing drivers while Newgarden and several former winners will be starting farther back for the 2026 Indianapolis 500
articles.content:
The first round of the revised qualifying to settle positions 13-33 for the 110th Running of the Indianapolis is in the books.
Advancing into the Fast 12 are Felix Rosenqvist (Meyer Shank Racing), D… [+3315 chars]
